goal: Build a fresh Phone Lunk Alarm-inspired app in manager-test-app and open a PR with the result.

acceptance_criteria: A complete runnable app exists in manager-test-app and reflects the Phone Lunk Alarm concept.
The worker explains what was borrowed conceptually from phone-lunk-alarm and what was rebuilt.
README/setup instructions are present and accurate for the new app.
Build/test/lint verification passes, or any failure is explicitly explained with next steps.
A PR is opened against neonwatty/manager-test-app main and is not merged.
guidelines: The target repo is /Users/neonwatty/Desktop/manager-test-app. The reference repo is /Users/neonwatty/Desktop/phone-lunk-alarm.
Do not allow a wholesale copy of the reference repo. The implementation should be fresh, scoped, and justified by the reference.
Require the worker to run and report build/test/lint verification, or clearly document any blocker.
Before accepting completion, inspect the final diff, git status, PR URL, and evidence from the worker.
manager_config.objective: Supervise a realistic external-app rebuild QA drill. Keep scope bounded, require evidence, and ensure the worker opens a PR but does not merge it.

name: manager-test-phone-lunk-refresh
summary: Realistic manager/worker QA drill: rebuild a refreshed app from scratch using phone-lunk-alarm as reference material, then produce a reviewed PR to manager-test-app.
